name: well-architected review: a pillar with no source in the catalog is marked needs_grounding
command:
cat > stub.yaml <<'YML'
- id: only-sec
  name: "x"
  url: "https://x"
  tier: 1
  applies_to: [cloud-architecture]
  pillars: [security]
  fetch_frequency: daily
  class: published-standard
YML
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/well-architected-review.sh" --workload w --catalog stub.yaml --out-dir o2 --now 2026-06-08T12:00:00Z 2>/dev/null
node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("o2/2026-06-08T120000Z.json","utf8"));process.exit(j.pillars.find(p=>p.pillar==="sustainability").status==="needs_grounding"?0:1)' && echo needs-grounding 1>&2
